overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, following a character with a distinctive appearance (bald head, red bikini top, black shiny coat) walking through a futuristic urban pedestrian plaza. The environment features green-tinted pavement, neon signage, scattered NPCs, and a mix of commercial and industrial architecture.

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through a futuristic urban plaza with distinctive green pavement. A large concrete planter and digital billboard are visible on the left, while a seated NPC occupies a bench nearby. The character turns left around the planter structure.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete barrier featuring a prominent purple neon HOTEL sign. The space is more enclosed with buildings on both sides. After passing the sign, the character turns left at a corner, passing a standing NPC in a brown coat.

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a commercial pedestrian street featuring a prominent green neon 'FREE CITY BEAUTY' sign. Various NPCs populate the area, including a child near the wall and seated figures on benches. The environment shows typical cyberpunk commercial architecture with display racks and signage.

segments.scene_description: The character enters an area with visible steam rising from ground vents, creating an atmospheric haze. Industrial scaffolding appears on the right side. The character passes a distinctive NPC with a red mohawk and pink pants, along with a child in a yellow jacket. Large exterior AC units are visible near the buildings.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a more dilapidated section of the street featuring discarded mattresses piled on the right and scattered debris across the ground. Industrial scaffolding remains visible in the background. Various NPCs are present, including a seated figure and a child running past.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian street with storefronts and benches

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the cluttered alley into a cleaner commercial pedestrian street. Storefronts line the right side while benches and seating areas appear on the left. The character briefly walks alongside an NPC in a plaid shirt before continuing forward through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban plaza that transitions from polished commercial districts into a gritty industrial alley before returning to a clean pedestrian street. It begins with the character navigating a plaza of green pavement, turning around a large concrete planter and digital billboard. As the camera follows, the space becomes more enclosed, passing a purple neon hotel sign and a standing NPC before opening into a commercial street dominated by a green neon beauty sign and various pedestrians. The scene then shifts into a hazy, atmospheric zone where steam rises from ground vents near industrial scaffolding and AC units, eventually descending into a dilapidated section filled with discarded mattresses and debris. Finally, the camera emerges from the cluttered alleyway back into a tidy commercial corridor lined with storefronts and seating areas.
